context: Realistic: non-transactional refund flow allows double refund under concurrent requests

checklist.name: Catches non-transactional refund risk
checklist.description: Identifies that the refund flow (read payment, check status, issue refund, update status) is not wrapped in a database transaction, allowing concurrent requests to both pass the status check and issue duplicate refunds

checklist.name: Risk classified yellow or higher
checklist.description: PR is classified as yellow or higher — it adds payment refund processing
